message:
docs(fcp-core): clarify chain linking semantics in revocation tests

Add documentation comments to test_event helper and validate_chain
function explaining that revocation_object_id is used as a stand-in
for the event's ObjectId in chain linking tests. In a real system,
prev points to the computed hash of the previous event, but tests
use this simplification for consistency.

Also moved BloomFilter import to module level and fixed clippy
doc_markdown warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
